title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Casa Grande

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Casa Grande
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!
